name: Bacon Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound bacon, chopped into small bits
1/4 cup butter or shortening, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crispy. Remove and chop into small bits.
2. Shred the cheese.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
4. In a saucepan, stir cornmeal with cold water over medium heat. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Cook for about 60 seconds when it thickens.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese, butter or shortening, garlic, and salt.
6. Pour in the milk. Stir in the egg yolks and add bacon bits.
7. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold into the batter with a spatula.
8. Pour batter into a greased casserole or soufflé dish (2-quart size).
9. Level the surface with a rubber spatula.
10. Bake in the preheated oven for about 1 hour, or until golden brown and puffy. Test by inserting a knife into the center; it should come out clean and dry when done. If not, return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and serve hot.
